name: canvas-bootstrap-mutual-exclusion
description: Bootstrap with both `canvasMode: true` AND `stackItemId` is malformed — canvas iframes are session-scoped (no pinned stack item). Defensive parsers SHOULD reject; the protocol does not require them to. Reference parser (`@ggui-ai/iframe-runtime` `validateBootstrapMeta`) currently accepts the combination but the field-pair has no defined consumer semantics. This fixture pins the contract intent so future parsers can opt into strict rejection without surprise.
